tasks.prompt:
/opc loop-tick

You are running one tick of the autonomous OPC loop for the MentorTable production-readiness pipeline.

State files (READ ALL THREE FIRST):
- /Users/surixing/Code/SuriWorld/MentorTable/.harness/loop-state.json — your cursor
- /Users/surixing/Code/SuriWorld/MentorTable/.harness/plan.md — units U1.1 through U10.1
- /Users/surixing/Code/SuriWorld/MentorTable/.harness/acceptance-criteria.md — global DoD (OUT-1..OUT-7)

OPC harness: export OPC_HARNESS="$HOME/.claude/skills/opc/bin/opc-harness.mjs"

Tick procedure (follow exactly):
1. cd /Users/surixing/Code/SuriWorld/MentorTable
2. Read .harness/loop-state.json → get next_unit. If next_unit is null OR loop status is "pipeline_complete" → CronDelete this cron job and stop.
3. Run: node "$OPC_HARNESS" next-tick --dir .harness — if it returns terminate:true, run the backlog drain per loop-protocol.md Step 7a, then CronDelete.
4. Read the unit's spec from .harness/plan.md (verify: and eval: lines are mandatory).
5. Determine unit type from suffix:
   - "implement" → dispatch ONE Agent (general-purpose) to do the work. Include the unit's verify line as the agent's exit gate. Agent MUST run the verify command and paste output before claiming done.
   - "review" → dispatch 2-3 Agents (one per role listed) IN PARALLEL. Each writes eval-{role}.md to .harness/nodes/{unit-id}/run_1/. Then orchestrator (you) writes handshake.json and runs `node "$OPC_HARNESS" synthesize .harness --node {unit-id}` to get verdict.
   - "e2e-verify" → orchestrator runs directly per executor-protocol.md against the deployed Vercel preview URL.
6. RULE: build and review NEVER share a tick. One unit per tick.
7. After unit completes:
   a. Run: node "$OPC_HARNESS" complete-tick --unit {unit-id} --artifacts {comma-separated-files} --description "{1-line summary}" --dir .harness
   b. If implement: git add -A && git commit -m "feat(prod): {unit-id} — {summary}"  (do NOT push)
   c. Update loop-state.json with result.
8. If verify fails: status="iterate", increment retry, do NOT advance next_unit. After 3 fails: status="blocked", surface to user, CronDelete.
9. Stop. The next cron tick will pick up.

Hard rules:
- NEVER mark a unit completed without producing the verification evidence its plan line requires.
- NEVER let a builder's subagent also write the review.
- NEVER push to remote. Commit locally only.
- NEVER bypass criteria-lint or coverage thresholds.
- If you hit ambiguity: write a "blocked" loop-state with a specific question and CronDelete. Better to wait for human than to guess wrong.

Tools you'll need: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Agent, webapp-testing skill (for U7.1 screenshots), CronDelete.
